file.content:
[tools]
flutter =    "3.32.4"
ruby =       "3.3.5"
cocoapods =  "1.16.2"
yarn =       "1.22.22"
node =       "22.13.0"
java =       "temurin-17.0.11+9"
python =     "3.11.4"
ffmpeg = "latest"

[tasks]
# Build
clean = "flutter clean && cd ios && rm -rf Podfile.lock Pods && cd .."
pod = "cd ios && pod install --repo-update && cd .."
get = "flutter pub get"
l10n = "flutter gen-l10n"
br = "dart run build_runner build"
br_clean = "dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs"
br_watch = "dart run build_runner watch --delete-conflicting-outputs"
# 局所的なビルド
br_filter = "dart run build_runner build --build-filter"
br_models = "dart run build_runner build --build-filter='lib/data/models/**'"
br_providers = "dart run build_runner build --build-filter='lib/providers/**'"
refresh = "flutter clean && flutter pub get && dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs && flutter gen-l10n"
analyze = "flutter analyze lib && flutter analyze test"
fix = "dart fix --apply"

# Test
prepare_test = "./scripts/update_test_flavor_api_url.sh && dart run test/_testdata/generators/main.dart && ./test/_testdata/init_db.sh"
test = "flutter test test --dart-define-from-file flavor/test.json --concurrency 1 --exclude-tags=vrt"
vrt = "flutter test --update-goldens test/vrt/visual_regression_test.dart"

# Format
format_arb = "arb_utils sort lib/l10n/app_en.arb && arb_utils sort lib/l10n/app_ja.arb"
format_dart = "dart format lib/"
format_import = "flutter pub run import_sorter:main lib/"

# Run
run-dev = "flutter run --dart-define-from-file=flavor/dev.json --debug"
run-stg = "flutter run --dart-define-from-file=flavor/stg.json --debug"
run-prd-old = "flutter run --dart-define-from-file=flavor/prd-old.json --debug"
run-prd = "flutter run --dart-define-from-file=flavor/prd.json --debug"

file.content:
name: baseball_detector_flutter
description: A new Flutter project.
publish_to: 'none'
version: 1.16.0+173

environment:
  sdk: '>=3.3.4 <4.0.0'
  flutter: 3.32.4

dependencies:
  flutter:
    sdk: flutter
  flutter_localizations:
    sdk: flutter

  # Authentication & AWS
  amplify_auth_cognito: 2.6.5
  amplify_auth_cognito_dart: 0.11.13
  amplify_flutter: 2.6.5

  # Deep linking & App info
  app_links: 6.4.1
  apple_product_name: 3.6.0
  package_info_plus: 8.3.1

  # Async & Utilities
  async: 2.13.0
  collection: 1.19.1
  meta: 1.16.0
  mutex: 3.1.0
  synchronized: 3.4.0
  uuid: 4.5.1

  # Network & HTTP
  dio: 5.9.0
  background_downloader: 9.2.5
  connectivity_plus: 6.1.5
  http_parser: 4.1.2
  mime: 2.0.0

  # UI Components & Charts
  cached_network_image: 3.4.1
  dots_indicator: 4.0.1
  fl_chart: 1.0.0
  flutter_hooks: 0.21.3
  flutter_slidable: 4.0.1
  flutter_svg: 2.2.1
  gap: 3.0.1
  visibility_detector: 0.4.0+2
  tutorial_coach_mark: 1.3.1

  # State Management
  hooks_riverpod: 2.6.1
  riverpod_annotation: 2.6.1

  # Device & Hardware
  device_info_plus: 11.5.0
  native_device_orientation: 2.0.3
  permission_handler: 12.0.1
  sensors_plus: 6.1.2
  wakelock_plus: 1.3.2

  # File & Storage
  file_saver: 0.3.1
  flutter_secure_storage: 9.2.4
  path: 1.9.1
  path_provider: 2.1.5
  shared_preferences: 2.5.3
  sqflite: 2.4.2

  # Media & Sharing
  image_picker: 1.2.0
  share_plus: 11.1.0
  video_player: 2.10.0

  # Web & In-app browser
  flutter_inappwebview: 6.1.5

  # Internationalization & Formatting
  intl: 0.20.2
  sprintf: 7.0.0

  # Logging & Debugging
  fimber: 0.7.0

  # Data Processing & Queues
  dynamic_parallel_queue: 1.0.3+2

  # JSON & Serialization (runtime annotations)
  freezed_annotation: 3.1.0
  json_annotation: 4.9.0

  # Version management
  pub_semver: 2.2.0

  # In-app purchases
  in_app_purchase: 3.2.3
  in_app_purchase_storekit: 0.4.4

  # UI development & VRT (required because files are in lib/ directory)
  playbook: 1.1.0

  # Local packages
  knowhere_configurable_camera:
    path: ./knowhere_configurable_camera
  
  knowhere_video_editor:
    path: ./knowhere_video_editor

  volume_key_listener:
    path: ./volume_key_listener

dev_dependencies:
  flutter_test:
    sdk: flutter

  flutter_lints: 6.0.0

  # Code generation tools
  build_runner: 2.5.4
  flutter_gen_runner: 5.11.0
  freezed: 3.0.6
  json_serializable: 6.9.5
  riverpod_generator: 2.6.5

  # Development tools
  import_sorter: 4.6.0
  flutter_launcher_icons: 0.14.4

  # Testing tools
  mockito: 5.4.6 
  shared_preferences_platform_interface: 2.4.1

  # UI development & debugging tools (generators only)
  playbook_generator: 1.1.0
  playbook_snapshot: 1.0.2

  # License analysis tools
  licenses_dart: 1.1.2

flutter_gen:
   integrations:
    flutter_svg: true

flutter:
  uses-material-design: true

  # 自動ファイル生成
  generate: true

  # To add assets to your application, add an assets section, like this:
  assets:
    - assets/images/

  fonts:
    - family: NotoSans
      fonts:
        - asset: assets/fonts/NotoSansJP-Light.ttf
          weight: 300
        - asset: assets/fonts/NotoSansJP-Regular.ttf
          weight: 400
        - asset: assets/fonts/NotoSansJP-Medium.ttf
          weight: 500
        - asset: assets/fonts/NotoSansJP-SemiBold.ttf
          weight: 600
        - asset: assets/fonts/NotoSansJP-Bold.ttf
          weight: 700

playbook_snapshot:
  snapshot_dir: ../../screenshots

import_sorter:
  ignored_files:
    - test/data/query_runner_test.dart
    - lib/generated_playbook.dart
    - lib/gen/assets.gen.dart
    - '\/*.g.dart'
    - '\/*.freezed.dart'
    - '\/*.mocks.dart'
    - '\/lib/l10n/*'

content.text: I can see that build_runner is available as a dev dependency. Let me try to create a custom approach and try to execute the build command manually. I'll check if there's a way to check the current generated files:

1→// dart format width=80
     2→// coverage:ignore-file
     3→// GENERATED CODE - DO NOT MODIFY BY HAND
     4→// ignore_for_file: type=lint
     5→// ignore_for_file: unused_element, deprecated_member_use, deprecated_member_use_from_same_package, use_function_type_syntax_for_parameters, unnecessary_const, avoid_init_to_null, invalid_override_different_default_values_named, prefer_expression_function_bodies, annotate_overrides, invalid_annotation_target, unnecessary_question_mark
     6→
     7→part of 'ai_coach_report.dart';
     8→
     9→// **************************************************************************
    10→// FreezedGenerator
    11→// **************************************************************************
    12→
    13→// dart format off
    14→T _$identity<T>(T value) => value;
    15→
    16→/// @nodoc
    17→mixin _$AICoachReport implements DiagnosticableTreeMixin {
    18→  String get id;
    19→  String get teamId;
    20→  AICoachReportParams get params;
    21→  AICoachReportStatus get status;
    22→  int get retryCount;
    23→  DateTime get createdAt;
    24→  DateTime get updatedAt;
    25→  DateTime? get deletedAt; // content が生成中の場合は、null ではなく {} として返ってくる
    26→  @JsonKey(fromJson: _contentFromJson, toJson: _contentToJson)
    27→  AICoachReportContent? get content;
    28→
    29→  /// Create a copy of AICoachReport
    30→  /// with the given fields replaced by the non-null parameter values.
    31→  @JsonKey(includeFromJson: false, includeToJson: false)
    32→  @pragma('vm:prefer-inline')
    33→  $AICoachReportCopyWith<AICoachReport> get copyWith =>
    34→      _$AICoachReportCopyWithImpl<AICoachReport>(
    35→          this as AICoachReport, _$identity);
    36→
    37→  @override
    38→  void debugFillProperties(DiagnosticPropertiesBuilder properties) {
    39→    properties
    40→      ..add(DiagnosticsProperty('type', 'AICoachReport'))
    41→      ..add(DiagnosticsProperty('id', id))
    42→      ..add(DiagnosticsProperty('teamId', teamId))
    43→      ..add(DiagnosticsProperty('params', params))
    44→      ..add(DiagnosticsProperty('status', status))
    45→      ..add(DiagnosticsProperty('retryCount', retryCount))
    46→      ..add(DiagnosticsProperty('createdAt', createdAt))
    47→      ..add(DiagnosticsProperty('updatedAt', updatedAt))
    48→      ..add(DiagnosticsProperty('deletedAt', deletedAt))
    49→      ..add(DiagnosticsProperty('content', content));
    50→  }

     5→// **************************************************************************

     9→_AICoachReport _$AICoachReportFromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) =>
    10→    _AICoachReport(
    11→      id: json['id'] as String,
    12→      teamId: json['teamId'] as String,
    13→      params:
    14→          AICoachReportParams.fromJson(json['params'] as Map<String, dynamic>),
    15→      status: $enumDecode(_$AICoachReportStatusEnumMap, json['status']),
    16→      retryCount: (json['retryCount'] as num).toInt(),
    17→      createdAt: DateTime.parse(json['createdAt'] as String),
    18→      updatedAt: DateTime.parse(json['updatedAt'] as String),
    19→      deletedAt: json['deletedAt'] == null
    20→          ? null
    21→          : DateTime.parse(json['deletedAt'] as String),
    22→      content: _contentFromJson(json['content'] as Map<String, dynamic>?),
    23→    );
    24→
    25→Map<String, dynamic> _$AICoachReportToJson(_AICoachReport instance) =>
    26→    <String, dynamic>{
    27→      'id': instance.id,
    28→      'teamId': instance.teamId,
    29→      'params': instance.params.toJson(),

    34→      'deletedAt': instance.deletedAt?.toIso8601String(),
    35→      'content': _contentToJson(instance.content),
    36→    };
    37→

    39→  AICoachReportStatus.accepted: 'accepted',

    41→  AICoachReportStatus.failed: 'failed',

content.text:
Now that I've fixed both issues, the .freezed.dart and .g.dart files need to be regenerated. Since I wasn't able to execute the command directly through slash commands, let me try to create a proper shell execution approach by looking at the available tools. 

Let me see if there's a way to check if there's a background bash session available or to create one:
